query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "your unembedding matrix is secretly a feature lens for text embeddings" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on fine-grained image classification and the compatibility between image and class embeddings, which is an off-domain application (computer vision) compared to the user's specific question about linguistic text embeddings and the theoretical properties of unembedding matrices. While both involve "embeddings," the paper does not measure the same mechanism, domain, or variables as the user's inquiry into text-based feature lenses, failing to satisfy any of the inclusion criteria
